channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: USA₮ lands on Celo: federally regulated digital dollars reach 4.23M weekly users, expanding beyond Ethereum. 🔒💥 https://Blockchain.News/news/usat-stablecoin-launches-celo-first-chain-after-ethereum #stablecoin #Celo #digitaldollar

item.title: Brace for federal AI power: Oracle lands NVIDIA B300 GPUs and xAI Grok in secure gov clouds. 🚀🛡️ https://Blockchain.News/news/oracle-nvidia-b300-xai-grok-government-cloud #AI #GovTech #CloudSecurity

item.title: Oracle rolls out an AI data platform built for US federal agencies—secure, compliant, ready for agentic apps. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/oracle-launches-ai-data-platform-federal-government #AI #GovTech #Security
